name: io.github.CorantGmbH/mcp-airq-cloud
title: air-Q Cloud
description: MCP server for air-Q Cloud API — access air quality data from anywhere

environmentVariables.name: AIRQ_CLOUD_CONFIG_FILE
environmentVariables.description: Path to the air-Q Cloud device configuration JSON file

environmentVariables.name: AIRQ_CLOUD_DEVICES
environmentVariables.description: Inline JSON array with configured air-Q Cloud devices

environmentVariables.name: AIRQ_CLOUD_API_KEY
environmentVariables.description: Global fallback API key (used when per-device api_key is omitted)
